result.summary: Found 3 visual issues: text cutoff in navigation, truncated game titles in exclusive games carousel, and carousel overflow affecting game visibility.

issues.description: Navigation tab text is cut off - shows 'Hot Gam' instead of full text (likely 'Hot Games')
issues.suggestion: Adjust tab width, font size, or container padding to accommodate full text without truncation. Consider responsive design adjustments for smaller screens.

issues.description: Game title text is cut off in BetRivers Exclusive Games carousel - visible as 'MAGNI', 'PHOI', and 'MUNG' instead of complete game names
issues.suggestion: Ensure game card titles have sufficient space or implement text truncation with ellipsis. Review the carousel item width and text container sizing.

issues.description: Right-most game cards in both game carousels are partially cut off/hidden, limiting visibility of available games
issues.suggestion: Adjust carousel padding/margins or ensure the third visible card is fully shown before requiring scroll. Consider showing 3 complete cards plus a hint of the 4th card to encourage scrolling.
